prestazioni: Engine swap to a turbocharged EF-DET (EF-SEN engine code, 660cc inline-3) with a forged internals kit from Tomei (pistons, connecting rods, and crankshaft) paired with a Garrett GT12 turbocharger (GT1241Z) for 1.2 bar of boost, targeting 180+ HP at the wheels. Requires a custom ECU tune via Haltech Elite 1500 with flex-fuel capability and a 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system from Fujitsubo (model: Legalis R).

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the S83P chassis, upgraded CV joints from Driveshaft Shop (DSS), and a lightweight flywheel from Spec Clutch (Stage 3+). Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Hijet S83P-specific valving) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for subframe and control arms.

Forced induction supporting mods: HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve, GReddy intercooler kit (front-mount, 400x160x60mm core), and a custom 3-core aluminum radiator from Koyorad (model: RS0826). Fuel system upgrades include a Walbro 255 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID725x injectors, and a Sard fuel pressure regulator (adjustable, 1:1 ratio).
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Hijet S83P-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a vented hood from Seibon Carbon (pre-preg carbon, 2x2 twill weave). Rear diffuser from Varis (model: Hijet S83P) with integrated tow hook and side skirts from C-West (JDM-spec, bolt-on).

OEM+ aggressive stance achieved via Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (15x6 +38 offset, 4x100 PCD) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (185/55R15). Fender rolling and pull required for fitment, with custom wheel spacers from 5Zigen (10mm hubcentric, 4x100).

Full JDM VIP-style exterior: custom rear spoiler from Trust/GReddy (model: Hijet S83P GT Wing, 3-piece aluminum), LED taillight conversion from Junyan (Hijet-specific, sequential turn signals), and a custom front lip from Garage Vary (carbon fiber, bolt-on). Interior stripped and soundproofed with Dynamat Extreme, then reupholstered in Alcantara (black/red) by Status Racing with custom door cards and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede).
